top_signals.title: House prices fall again as property market ‘deteriorates’
top_signals.summary: House prices fell again in May as the mortgage rate hikes and surging energy bills caused by the Iran war continued to take their toll on the UK’s fragile property market. The UK’s average house price fell by 0.6 per cent to £278,024 in May, compared to 0.4 per cent growth in April, according to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump hits out at ‘chirping’ critics as Iran peace talks enter new month at impasse
top_signals.summary: Trump's Truth Social post comes as air strikes between the U.S. and Iran resumed over the weekend.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
